ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-07-2011. SEP-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT AS TO DEFT: AVI CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D/B/A NATALIE'S GALLERY A COPY OF THE SUMMONS & COMPLT; ADR PKTF; STIP TO ADR; CMS; AND NTC TO PLTF FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY, AN IOWA CORPORATION

ARBITRATOR WILLIAM FLETCHER CAMPBELL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-18-2011 THROUGH FEB-16-2012.

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BUCHANAN, SHELLEY SUBSTITUTED FOR VON ROCK, DIEDRE AS ATTORNEY FOR AVI CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D/B/A NATALIE'S GALLERY

ORDER AND STIPULATION EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISIDICTION TO MAY-16-2012

THE ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-13-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAY-16-2012. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON MAR-13-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610, FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. JUN-19-2012 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY, AN IOWA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD OF ARBITRATOR, DATED MAY-16-2012.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY, AN IOWA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES
